description: Benchmark reference fixture for summer signed component totals with positive heat-flow balance.
method: Standard-Based Calculation / Annual 8760 Energy Balance Signed Components
sourceReference: Internal benchmark reference values derived from constant signed hourly component loads; no external equivalence claim.
assumptions: Magnitude component fields are aggregated as non-negative kWh.
Net component fields preserve the sign of hourly balance values.
Solar and internal gains are magnitude-only annual totals.
notes: This fixture verifies signed transmission, ventilation and ground totals plus magnitude solar/internal gains.
